title: BackendPostureState
description: Typed backend posture state projected by broker local API.

instance_id.description: Current launcher instance identity this posture snapshot applies to.

backend_kind.description: Current selected backend kind for this instance.

preferred_backend_kind.description: Preferred backend kind when no explicit reduced-assurance posture is active.

reduced_assurance_active.description: True when the active backend posture is reduced-assurance.

pending_approval.description: True when a backend posture change is awaiting approval.

pending_approval_id.description: Pending approval identity when pending_approval is true.

latest_policy_decision_hash.description: Most recent backend-posture policy decision digest reference.

latest_applied_evidence_ref.description: Most recent backend-posture application evidence digest reference.
